title: Origins Datapack
description: A datapack focused on recreating the original Origins Fabric Mod by Apace
body:
![Origins Datapack Banner Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4ceaa8d9ca69e03c0da3173df51c97cbbda3cd2.png)
# A RECREATION OF THE ORIGINS FABRIC MOD
### DISCLAIMER: THIS IS NOT AN ORIGIN ADDON
This datapack was created with the goal in recreating the Fabric Origins mod by Apace
### ANNOUNCEMENTS
**UPCOMING FEATURE: ADDON ORIGINS!**\
Join the discord server for more info, have questions or even have suggestions by using the link [here](https://discord.gg/xCz6DP3P)!

## Features
### 6 Origins Ported From the Original Mod
![Origins Avian Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc623be5a63c11a7a924e700047328a60a3a8502.png)\
![Origins Blazeborn Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de701272967e6352d6212f3d08db1c07ef756c0b.png)\
![Origins Elytrian Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd57478f985d8c7d9f13a7235904487f1c8112a7.png)\
![Origins Enderian Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c66279e5f4195f412442cab83d5b1ab9b393758.png)\
![Origins Merling Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/128b7bb4de408ff3c03eca0ecf61db23da75e0e9.png)\
![Origins Arachnid Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f745cb2afa2800c61ea19d6a916146730e1ac98.png)

### 4 Brand New Original Origins
![Origins Evoker Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/733e524286d8a001b8e2e9369b05fc0af9c7e1d4.png)\
![Origins Wraith Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec0e91592cc83209851bd2f799d90a51cf3cdba1.png)\
![Origins Giant Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98d52e343380e62aec9c1613b9d0b2e7f38ad616.png)\
![Origins Dwarf Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e3d5fd4d6b044e0bb9ae014b3ddf758d07026e6.png)

### Features an Origin Selection command
Type /trigger pick_origin to select an origin
### Datapack Only
This datapack does NOT require the Original Origins mod in any way, just put the datapack into your world folder and you are good to go!
### New Advancements 
![Origins Advancement Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a5270a19fb5ba9ed02dd1b6839daf364f5571e2.png)
 
Each origin has custom advancements for them to unlock\
\
